spell_card.name: Detect Magic
spell_card.description_excerpt: When the detect magic spell is cast, the caster detects magical radiations in a path 10 feet wide and up to 30 yards long. The intensity of the magic can also be determined (dim, faint, moderate, strong, overwhelming). [Beschreibung unvollstaendig — siehe PHB p.199]
